title: Pedro's Bakery
description: Extremely customizable cakes, cupcakes, donuts etc.
body:
![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_4372b829-ce0a-411b-b024-db8a62934a4a.png)

Pedro's Bakery adds baked goods to your game! This bakery mod is heavily focused on customization, meaning you can make many different types of cakes and cupcakes, pies of any flavor, cookies with any shape, and donuts with many frostings. You can also make tortillas and quesadillas.

# ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_df6f31ae-1b51-4ee4-b3e5-3466ce308231.png)

# 📦 Content

## Cakes and Cupcakes

Cake mixture can be made by mixing egg, sugar, wheat, and butter in milk in a beater. For other flavors, you can add different items on top of those (non-exhaustive: sweet berries, cocoa beans, TNT, melon). To make cake, right-click the beater with any baking tray. You may have to do this multiple times to fill the baking tray. For cupcakes, right-click it with a cupcake tray.

After getting your tray full, put it on a hot block (the induction oven looks good, but you can use magma blocks or even lava) and wait until you hear a ding. For cake, right-click the baking tray to grab it. For cupcakes, you need to right-click each cupcake slot with a cupcake liner.

Cakes can have features. For instance, you can right-click it with an enchanted golden apple to add an enchantment glint to it, or with a mushroom to plant it on top. Some features are inedible, however.  

## Pies

To make a pie, you will need two dough and an ingredient. Start by making the pie tray, then place it on the ground and right-click it with dough, then with your ingredient, then with dough again.

After getting your tray full, put it on a hot block (the induction oven looks good, but you can use magma blocks or even lava) and wait until you hear a ding.

## Shaped Cookies

To make shaped cookies, craft a Cookie Table and place dough in the left slot. You can then draw the cookie's shape in the middle.

## Frosting Bottles

Frosting bottles can be used on donuts, cakes, and cupcakes. To make frosting, mix milk and sugar. Afterwards, you can add ingredients like sweet berries or cocoa beans or even inedible ones like grass and dirt.

You can also drink the frosting bottles. Some of them have effects.

## Other

This mod also has donuts and quesadilla, but those are pretty simple and you can figure them out with the recipe book.

# ❓ Questions

Q: Does this mod replace \[Let's Do\] Bakery?  
A: No, you can use both and they'll work fine. This mod even has compatibility with Bakery.

Q: Can you add \[feature\]?  
A: You can suggest on our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/GDNRd5yvxa). I'd be willing to accept suggestions and constructive criticism :)

Q: I found a bug.  
A: Report it on the project's GitHub: [Pedro's Bakery on GitHub](https://github.com/Pedro270707/pedros-bakery)

Q: What is your favorite item in the mod?  
A: Cake.
